title: String Interpolation
description: Build dynamic strings by inserting variable values directly into string literals using backslash and parentheses.
problemStatement:
Dynamic messages! Create a variable `userName` with the value `"Alice"` and then store a message `"Welcome, Alice!"` in a constant named `greeting` using string interpolation.

**Requirement:** Use the `\(name)` syntax within your string literal.
hints: String interpolation is the standard way to combine strings and variables in Swift.
